Plugin.Name: Top Processes
Plugin.Overview: A minimalist, native-looking Unraid Dashboard tile that lists the processes using the most CPU and memory — like htop, but matching Unraid's aesthetic. Each process shows twin flat CPU + RAM bars (severity-coloured), name, user, PID and absolute memory. Sort by CPU or MEM and pick the refresh rate right from the tile header. Accurate %CPU from /proc (kernel threads included, so the real culprit shows), with an overall CPU + io-wait readout that reconciles with the official Processor tile. Tracks all themes; light on resources, no background daemon.
